description: Product description This classic, unisex Santa hat is made from a soft, double-layered plush fabric that provides warmth and comfort during winter festivities. It's designed to fit most adults. The hat is versatile for parties, cosplay, and family photos, and is highlighted as an excellent and thoughtful Christmas gift for friends and family. Package includes: 1 Color: red and white Materials: double-layered plush fabric Size: 32x45cm Customer service: If you are dissatisfied with your purchase for any reason, please contact us by email.
